evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Build new Looker dashboards from scratch within tight deadlines

evidence.jd_authorship: Build new Looker dashboards from scratch within tight deadlines

velocity_vs_rigour_quote: Build new Looker dashboards from scratch within tight deadlines
velocity_vs_rigour_reasoning: Explicit velocity signals (tight deadlines, fast-paced growth) balance with rigour signals (high accuracy, rigorous verification of outputs).
domain_risk_quote: Exposure to major clients like Booking.com and Google Maps
domain_risk_reasoning: While involving major clients, the JD lacks explicit language about financial reporting, compliance, or regulatory requirements that would indicate high risk.
data_team_maturity_quote: Identify and propose enhancements to reporting systems for better clarity and faster creation
data_team_maturity_reasoning: The JD references existing infrastructure and tools (data lake, Looker, BigQuery, Kafka, Airflow) and improvement work, indicating a team past initial build but actively scaling.
jd_authorship_quote: Build new Looker dashboards from scratch within tight deadlines
jd_authorship_reasoning: Specific tool mention (Looker) and clear responsibilities show technical knowledge, but most other responsibilities use generic language without operational context or methodology details.
stakeholder_orientation_quote: Identify and propose enhancements to reporting systems for better clarity and faster creation
stakeholder_orientation_reasoning: Responsibilities focus on building and improving analytics infrastructure and reporting systems that serve data consumers and the platform itself.
autonomy_level_quote: Leverage available tools and resources to solve problems independently
autonomy_level_reasoning: The role includes strategic autonomy to solve independently and anticipate long-term impacts, balanced against execution responsibilities like building dashboards and maintaining accuracy.
greenfield_vs_fix_quote: Build new Looker dashboards from scratch; Identify and propose enhancements to reporting systems
ai_role_reasoning: No AI tools, coding assistants, or AI infrastructure building mentioned in any phrase.
testing_framing_reasoning: No testing tools listed and no ownership verbs (own, ensure, define, implement, establish) for quality practices.
loss_aversion_framing_quote: Build new Looker dashboards from scratch within tight deadlines
loss_aversion_framing_reasoning: Framing emphasizes delivery velocity and deadline pressure, not operational reliability fears or compliance/trust concerns.
